global_description: A medium-sized songbird with a stocky body and short neck. It has a striking black and white plumage with a vivid rose-red patch on its breast. The wings are black with white patches, and the tail is black with white tips. The beak is thick and conical, ideal for seed eating.

part_details.head: Black with a short neck, featuring a thick, pale conical beak.
part_details.breast: Bright rose-red patch contrasting with the white underparts.
part_details.wings: Black with distinct white patches, medium length.
part_details.tail: Black with white tips, slightly rounded.
part_details.body: Stocky, predominantly white with black upperparts.

spatial_relations: The rose-red patch is located centrally on the breast.
The white patches are distributed across the black wings.
The thick beak is positioned centrally on the black head.
